location: On a corpse beside the road, guarded by three Messmer Soldiers, along the upper southeast road leaving Castle Front — just before a wooden blockade, on the approach toward Castle Ensis.

source.name: Corpse guarded by 3 Messmer Soldiers on the road southeast of Castle Front

tactics: From the Castle Front Grace (east side of the Ellac Greatbridge in Gravesite Plain), summon Torrent and head southeast, sticking to the left/upper path.
The corpse holding the spear sits just before a wooden blockade; three Messmer Soldiers patrol around it.
No arena locks you in — you can fight the soldiers or simply ride up on Torrent, grab the item, and retreat if you'd rather not fight three at once.
Castle Front has a second southeast route that drops into a swamp valley with skirmishing giants — that lower path does not lead to this pickup, so stay on the upper road.
lore: Rather than being hammered out on an anvil, this spear's shaft is cast from metal using a refined molding technique, giving it an unusually light, slender build. That lightness is what lets it fire off quick, repeated thrusts that heavier spears can't match.

builds.name: Dexterity poke build
builds.why: Scales primarily with Dexterity and weighs only 3.0, favoring fast, spammable jabs for a nimble Dex-focused spear build.

builds.name: Early rapid-thrust spear
builds.why: Modest requirements (10 Str / 26 Dex) and a unique quick-thrust moveset make it a strong early-DLC pick for poke-and-retreat play before heavier spears are found.
